analysis_metadata.dedup_notes: Removed: gut-brain axis duplicate (Nature + Science), military AI governance overlap (IEEE + MIT TR), Middle East crisis overlap (WHO + UN)

ranked_signals.title: Lovable Adds $100M Revenue in Single Month with 146 Employees
ranked_signals.rationale: Unprecedented revenue-per-employee ratio signals paradigm shift in software economics. Vibe-coding market explosion could restructure entire software industry employment, outsourcing, and pricing models. Cross-impact: reshapes E_Economic (labor markets), S_Social (employment).

ranked_signals.title: Intel Heracles: 5000x FHE Speedup — Computing on Encrypted Data
ranked_signals.rationale: Makes fully homomorphic encryption practically viable for the first time. 5000x speedup enables secure computation on encrypted data at scale. Cross-impact: transforms P_Political (privacy regulation), E_Economic (data economy), s_spiritual (privacy rights).

ranked_signals.title: Iran War Disrupts Global Energy Transition — Strait of Hormuz Crisis
ranked_signals.rationale: Middle East conflict threatening Strait of Hormuz creates cascading energy supply disruption affecting global climate transition. Oil/LNG price surges impact every economy. Cross-impact: E_Economic (prices), P_Political (geopolitics), S_Social (humanitarian).

ranked_signals.title: Mind Robotics $500M Series A — Industrial AI Robotics
ranked_signals.rationale: Massive Series A for manufacturing automation from Rivian founder signals acceleration of factory robotics. Cross-impact: E_Economic (manufacturing jobs), S_Social (labor displacement).

ranked_signals.title: China's OpenClaw AI Agent Gold Rush
ranked_signals.rationale: Open-source AI agent commercialization outpacing security readiness in China. Government-backed adoption creates service economy. Security risks significant. Cross-impact: E_Economic (service industry), P_Political (China tech policy), s_spiritual (AI safety).

ranked_signals.title: VC Mega-Fund Resurgence: $10B+ Funds Return
ranked_signals.rationale: General Catalyst $10B, Spark $3B — AI-driven mega-fund wave signals unprecedented capital concentration in tech. Nearly 40 new unicorns in 2026 Q1. Cross-impact: T_Technological (innovation funding), S_Social (wealth concentration).

ranked_signals.title: Data Centers to Consume 12% of US Electricity by 2028
ranked_signals.rationale: AI infrastructure energy consumption tripling from 4% to 12% of US electricity by 2028. 100% of executives view power measurement as critical. Cross-impact: T_Technological (AI scaling limits), E_Economic (energy costs).

ranked_signals.title: Middle East Health Crisis: 1300+ Dead in Iran, Healthcare Under Attack
ranked_signals.rationale: WHO documents 18 verified attacks on healthcare in Iran, 100K+ displaced. WHO Dubai logistics hub disrupted affecting 1.5M people across 25 countries. Cross-impact: P_Political (humanitarian law), E_Economic (regional stability).

ranked_signals.title: Google Closes $32B Wiz Acquisition
ranked_signals.rationale: Largest cloud security acquisition ever. Signals massive enterprise security investment wave and Google's cloud dominance strategy. Cross-impact: E_Economic (M&A), P_Political (antitrust).

ranked_signals.title: Replit $9B Valuation — Triples in 6 Months
ranked_signals.rationale: Vibe-coding platform valuation tripling in 6 months confirms explosive demand for AI developer tools. Targeting $1B ARR. Cross-impact with Lovable signal: defines new market category.

ranked_signals.title: 0.6M+ Component Coherent 4D LiDAR Imaging Sensor
ranked_signals.rationale: Nature: integrated photonic focal plane with 600K+ components. Revolutionary for autonomous vehicles, robotics, remote sensing. Hardware breakthrough enabling next-gen autonomous systems.

ranked_signals.title: Pentagon vs Anthropic: AI Domestic Surveillance Legal Battle
ranked_signals.rationale: Regulatory gap exposed: laws predate AI capability. Government can purchase commercial data on citizens without warrants. Defines boundary between AI companies and military. Cross-impact: s_spiritual (privacy), T_Technological (AI governance).

ranked_signals.title: Net-Zero Generates £110B Yearly Benefits — CCC Report
ranked_signals.rationale: UK CCC quantifies: net-zero delivers £110B/yr benefits, household bills rise only 4% in crises vs 59% in fossil-dependent scenario. Strong economic case for energy transition.

ranked_signals.title: Meta Acquires Moltbook — Agentic Commerce Future
ranked_signals.rationale: Meta's strategic pivot toward AI agents handling commerce and advertising. Signals platform-level shift from human browsing to agent-mediated transactions.

ranked_signals.title: Dead Internet Theory Confirmed — AI Content Majority
ranked_signals.rationale: Analysis argues AI-generated content has reached tipping point where authentic human content becomes minority. Signals fundamental shift in information ecosystem. Cross-impact: s_spiritual (authenticity), S_Social (trust).

ranked_signals.title: HN Bans AI-Generated Comments — Platform Resistance Movement
ranked_signals.rationale: Highest-engagement HN item (1813 points). 'HN is for conversation between humans.' Growing backlash against AI-generated content in human discourse spaces. Cross-impact: T_Technological (AI policy), S_Social (community norms).

ranked_signals.title: White House Plan to Break Up NCAR Climate Lab Advances
ranked_signals.rationale: Iconic US climate research institution faces dissolution. Multiple organizations bidding for segments. Threatens decades of climate research continuity. Cross-impact: E_Environmental (climate science), T_Technological (research infrastructure).

ranked_signals.title: Gut-Brain Axis: Microbiome Drives Age-Related Cognitive Decline
ranked_signals.rationale: Nature: direct mechanism linking intestinal dysfunction to cognitive decline via MCFA-producing bacteria and GPR84 inflammation. Potential therapeutic target for aging-related dementia. Cross-impact: S_Social (aging population).

ranked_signals.title: Buddhism's Global Decline: Only Major Religion to Shrink
ranked_signals.rationale: Pew: Buddhism the only major religion to decline globally (5% reduction 2010-2020). Concentrated in Japan and South Korea — linked to broader East Asian demographic and value shifts.

ranked_signals.title: Stablecoin-Powered Card for Africa's Unbanked — Financial Inclusion
ranked_signals.rationale: Blockchain-based financial inclusion breakthrough: stablecoin-linked Visa card for unbanked Africans. Bypasses traditional banking infrastructure. Cross-impact: T_Technological (blockchain), S_Social (inclusion).

emerging_themes.description: Multiple signals converge on AI agents becoming economic actors: OpenClaw commercialization, vibe-coding platforms, Meta's agentic commerce. New service economies forming around AI tool deployment.
Iran conflict creating cascading disruptions across health, energy, cybersecurity, and humanitarian domains. $1B/day cost, Strait of Hormuz crisis, hacktivist attacks on healthcare.
Convergent signals on AI-generated content overwhelming human content. Platform bans, dead internet thesis, AI misinformation in conflicts, sycophancy in chatbots.
AI infrastructure energy demand tripling while Middle East conflict disrupts energy supply. Net-zero economics strengthen but implementation challenged by geopolitical instability.
